3225740.name: Dark Cooking
3225740.description:
Dark Cooking - A colorful 3D puzzle game for logic and thinking! The little witch asks you for help! She is going to cook her signature pumpkin soup, but she doesn't have enough pumpkins!

You have to take on the role of the most dexterous and clever assistant and go to her pumpkin garden for pumpkins! But be careful, to get the pumpkins, you will have to solve difficult puzzles! But most importantly, you can't drop the potion on the ground, which can spoil the whole soup!

Game features:
- Different difficulty levels
- Beautiful graphics
- Pleasant music
